\tzpentry{ID5537}{Action Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5537 introduces Action Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} S_i(t) \approx S^\star \qquad\Longrightarrow\qquad \lambda_i(t) = \lambda_0 \exp\!\left[ -\frac{(S_i - S^\star)^2}{2\sigma_S^2} \right] \left(1 + \beta R_i\right), \end{equation}
